---
title: "Our Services"
title-block-style: none
description: "Comprehensive technology services: digital infrastructure, NIS2 compliance, cybersecurity, cloud, and digital resilience for modern organizations."
page-layout: custom
from: markdown+raw_html
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Our <span class="gr">Services</span></h1>
    <p>Comprehensive technology solutions for organizations that value security, transparency, and open-source.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Everything you need</h2>
    <p class="sub">Five practices working together to keep your business running and secure.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i><h3>Digital Infrastructure</h3><p>Open-source UNIX and Apple platforms built for modern businesses.</p><a href="/digital/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Security</h3><p>24/7 SOC monitoring, threat hunting, and incident response.</p><a href="/security/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-clipboard-check"></i><h3>NIS2 Compliance</h3><p>Gap analysis and compliance roadmaps for the EU directive.</p><a href="/services/nis2/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud"></i><h3>Cloud</h3><p>Migration, DevOps, and multi-cloud infrastructure.</p><a href="/services/cloud/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i><h3>Digital Resilience</h3><p>Business continuity and disaster recovery frameworks.</p><a href="/services/digital-resilience/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Code on screen"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Built on open-source.<br>Secured by default.</h2>
        <p>Every tool we deploy can be audited. Every system is hardened from day one. We use battle-tested open-source software so you get full transparency without sacrificing security.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/security/" class="m-lk">See our security approach</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-overhead.webp" alt="Team meeting"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>From discovery to<br>continuous support.</h2>
        <p>We start by understanding your requirements, then plan, build, test, and deploy. After launch, we provide ongoing monitoring and maintenance — so nothing falls through the cracks.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-lk">Talk to our team</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">15+</div><div class="m-nl">Years experience</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">100%</div><div class="m-nl">Open-source stack</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">EU</div><div class="m-nl">Data residency</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">24/7</div><div class="m-nl">Monitoring</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Ready to get started?</h2>
    <p>30 minutes. No pitch. Just an honest look at what you need.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Book a free consultation</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 30 min &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> No commitment
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
